structured_content.text: This week’s episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, and you will not be surprised to know that Elon Musk comes up once or twice. Kati  Podcast This week’s episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, and you will not be surprised to know that Elon Musk comes up once or twice. Katie and I also discuss the collapse of the Paramount deal and Wells Fargo’s mouse jigglers. You can listen to the episode here : Do you have thoughts about the podcast or the financial news of the week? We’d love to hear from you. You can email us at moneypod@bloomberg.net with ideas or questions, and we might respond on the air. You can get Money Stuff: The Podcast at Apple, Spotify or wherever you get your podcasts. Subscribe so you never miss an episode, and leave us a review. Thanks! Follow Us You received this message because you are subscribed to Bloomberg's Money Stuff newsletter.
